## Checklist

- [ ] I tested the change in a real Claude Code session (not just static review)
- [ ] If this touches a core hook, output stays under ~200 tokens
- [ ] If this adds a new archetype, Tier and classification signals are documented
- [ ] `SKILL.md` and `README.md` reflect new commands / flags if any
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`
